result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates stubs for Python.Net

Usage:
  PythonNetStubGenerator.Tool [options]

Options:
  --dest-path <dest-path>        Path to save the subs to.
  --target-dlls <target-dlls>    Target DLLsz
  --search-paths <search-paths>  Path to search for referenced assemblies []
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
